summary: First-finish smoke test for Lumière luxury catalog app. Backend and frontend flows verified end-to-end. All critical API endpoints and UI flows work.
passed: GET /api/products/{id} returns product; invalid id returns 404
GET /api/settings returns settings with admin_email=samratglassemp@gmail.com and whatsapp_number
POST /api/inquiries with customer_name/customer_email creates inquiry and computes total (200)
GET /api/export/products.csv returns CSV with correct content-type
Home page renders hero and navigation (hero-explore-btn visible)
Catalog page renders 8 product cards; search filter narrows to 1 for 'Noir'; sort/filters/price slider present
Export CSV and Export PDF buttons present on Catalog page
Product detail: add-to-cart-btn works and cart badge updates to 1; favorite toggle works; whatsapp-btn has valid wa.me link
Cart inquiry submission via UI succeeds and cart clears (badge disappears, backend inquiry count incremented)
Favorites page renders with empty state
Admin dashboard: all 5 tabs (dashboard, products, inquiries, messages, settings) navigate successfully; stats display correctly

failed.issue: POST /api/inquiries requires 'customer_name'/'customer_email' fields (frontend Cart.jsx correctly sends these). Any external client sending 'name'/'email' would get 422. Not a bug — frontend is aligned.
failed.evidence: Sending {name,email} returns 422; sending {customer_name,customer_email} returns 200 with computed total. Frontend Cart.jsx uses correct field names.

notes: No auth required per user choice. WhatsApp is a wa.me link (no API). Contact form saves to DB only per user choice. Test credentials file not needed (no auth).
